auto_fixes_applied.description: Wrapped `int_of_string mid` with `try ... with _ -> -1` to prevent unhandled Failure exception on malformed module_id query param (e.g. ?module_id=abc). Pattern matches existing protection at line 303.

Fixed template literal: `${modPath}.replace(/^.*\//, '')` → `${modPath.replace(/^.*\//, '')}` so `.replace()` is inside the interpolation and actually strips the path prefix. Previously rendered the method call as literal text.

findings.summary: S.reciprocalSet is never set — reciprocal curved arcs silently broken
findings.evidence: app.js:389 — `const reciprocalSet = new Set()` is a local variable in renderNeighborhood. app.js:437 — passed to drawGraph but drawGraph (line 445) declares it as a parameter that the TS LSP flags as 'declared but never read'. app.js:509 — `ticked()` reads `S.reciprocalSet` which is never written to `S`, so it is always `undefined`. Result: `isReciprocal` is always false and all edges render as straight lines regardless of reciprocal pairs.
findings.fix: Add `S.reciprocalSet = reciprocalSet;` in renderNeighborhood immediately before the `drawGraph(...)` call (line 437). Remove the unused `reciprocalSet` parameter from `drawGraph` signature and its callers, or keep it for static initial draw (currently no-op). The `ticked()` function already reads `S.reciprocalSet` — storing it to state is the minimal fix.

risks_checked.R1_boolean_serialization: PASS — all boolean fields (exposed, has_mli, has_pre, has_post, has_violators, truncated) use json_bool(col_bool stmt N) → `Bool. arch_serve.ml:28-31 col_bool returns n<>0L; arch_serve.ml:10 json_bool = `Bool b.
risks_checked.R2_sigint_shutdown: PASS — DB validated at lines 367-381 before Switch.run (389); signal handler at 383-388 calls Promise.resolve; Server.run at 396 with stop:stop_p. Confirmed exit 0 by smoke test.
risks_checked.R3_bfs_bidirectionality: PASS — neighborhood_bfs queries both outgoing (caller_id=?) lines 99-116 and incoming (callee_id=?) lines 118-135. Single edges_seen hashtable deduplicates.
risks_checked.R4_db_before_port: PASS — DB open/validate at 367-381 is before Eio.Switch.run (389) which is before Eio.Net.listen (391).
risks_checked.R5_no_sim_restart: PASS — app.js:420-431 `if (!S.sim)` creates simulation once; lines 433-435 reuse with .nodes()/.links()/.alpha(0.3).restart().
risks_checked.R6_kind_null_as_must: PASS — reaches_bfs at arch_serve.ml:197-200 uses `AND (kind = 'MUST' OR kind IS NULL)`.
risks_checked.R7_ppx_blob_completeness: PASS — dune preprocessor_deps lists all 4 files: index.html, app.js, style.css, d3.min.js.
risks_checked.R8_no_must_path_copy: PASS — app.js:744 `cannot definitely reach ... through guaranteed calls` — does not say 'no path exists'.
risks_checked.R9_url_encoding: PASS — app.js:121 navigate() uses encodeURIComponent; app.js:108 hash router decodes; app.js:361 neighborhood API call encodes; app.js:736 reaches API call encodes both from/to.
